gigapan.description:
Looking into the observation 'tower.'  I think they would have someone on watch, maybe with a scope mounted on that rusy pillar.

I felt nervous inside the box.  i felt responsible for everything outside, responsible
to distinquish the rip tide from the track of an enemy submarine.
